title: citrus × aurantium var. minutissima
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. minutissima, also known as Zhi Ke or Calamansi, is a small, citrus fruit-bearing plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to warm the body, dispel cold, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium var. minutissima include its potential to boost the immune system, improve respiratory health, and aid in weight loss, among others. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including tea, capsules, and essential oil, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and digestive problems.
